draft_text: ADHD is one of the most common disorders diagnosed in children.
rationale: Extracted from remote_attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder-adhd_aa7556cf096a.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: NIMH supports research into the possible causes of ADHD.
rationale: Extracted from remote_attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder-adhd_aa7556cf096a.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: NIMH-supported research is also exploring the behavioral profiles of children and adults with ADHD to better diagnose and treat the disorder.
rationale: Extracted from remote_attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder-adhd_aa7556cf096a.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: We’re also supporting research on treatments, services, and interventions for people with ADHD and their families.
rationale: Extracted from remote_attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder-adhd_aa7556cf096a.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Additionally, researchers are exploring new technologies, like mobile apps and virtual reality, that can deliver information to people in real time to help them change their behavior.
rationale: Extracted from remote_attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder-adhd_aa7556cf096a.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Learn how to find help for yourself or someone else.
rationale: Extracted from remote_attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder-adhd_aa7556cf096a.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You can also find support and locate mental health services in your area on the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration website.
